title: Enhance send money button with circular design and elegant styling

requirements.summary: Double the size of the floating action button containing the Daily logo
acceptanceCriteria: Button dimensions are twice the current size
Button remains properly positioned on the screen

file_operations.description: Increase the button dimensions to double the current size. Update both width and height CSS properties to maintain proportional scaling. Ensure the button remains fixed at the bottom-right position and does not overlap with other UI elements.

requirements.summary: Transform the floating action button into a perfectly circular shape
acceptanceCriteria: Button has equal width and height
Border radius creates a perfect circle
Logo is centered within the circular button

file_operations.description: Apply equal width and height dimensions to create a square base. Set border-radius to 50% or use rounded-full Tailwind class to create a perfect circle. Ensure the Daily logo (EDD5B96E-65C8-4396-B13D-60441938E0F3-1.png) remains centered using flexbox centering (items-center justify-center).

requirements.summary: Fix the Daily logo proportions to display without deformation
acceptanceCriteria: Logo appears clear and undistorted at the new size
Logo is properly scaled to fit within the circular button

file_operations.description: Apply object-fit: contain or object-fit: cover to the img element to preserve the aspect ratio of the Daily logo. Adjust the img width and height to be proportional to the button size (e.g., 60-70% of button dimensions) to ensure proper scaling within the circular boundary. Remove any conflicting CSS that might stretch or distort the image.

requirements.summary: Add elegant visual styling with shadows, gradients, and hover animations
acceptanceCriteria: Button has a subtle drop shadow that enhances depth
Button includes a smooth gradient effect
Hover state includes smooth transition animations
Overall appearance is polished and professional for a money transfer action

file_operations.description: Add a subtle box-shadow (e.g., shadow-lg or shadow-xl Tailwind classes) to create depth. Apply a smooth gradient background using CSS linear-gradient or Tailwind gradient utilities (e.g., from-yellow-400 to-yellow-500 for Daily branding). Implement hover animations with CSS transitions including scale transform (hover:scale-105), shadow enhancement (hover:shadow-2xl), and smooth transition durations (transition-all duration-300). Ensure all effects maintain the circular shape and create a professional, trustworthy appearance suitable for money transfer actions.
